message:
Merge PR #2187: fix(refinery): extract ConvoyFields typed accessor (ZFC gt-re2y)

Extract typed ConvoyFields accessor to replace ad-hoc string parsing of
convoy bead descriptions. Centralizes convoy metadata access.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2187
Author: DreadPirateRobertz
